name: source code analyzer: getSourceCode().getAllComments() returns line and block comments
command: bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/rule-engine/cli.sh" --rule comments-trace --in "$PWD/file.js" 2>out.txt && grep -E "Block" out.txt 1>&2 && echo ok 1>&2
setup: printf "// hi\\n/* bye */ const x = 1;" > file.js
